# name

**Instance Property**

The name of the media group.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

This string is human-readable. It is either user created (such as the name of an iTunes playlist) or already localized.

## Accessing Group Attributes

- **attributes**: A dictionary of attributes describing the media group.
- **iconImage**: The media group’s icon.
- **url**: The location of the media group.
- **modificationDate**: The date and time when the media group was last altered.
